title: RealTimeWeather
description: Sync your server's time and weather with the real world
body:
![4SplitSingleLineCloseColors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WRA6ODcm/images/e2764ca87bd150b13fe2febeebdae984d70037c9.png)

## 📘 About

RealTimeWeather is a simple plugin that allows you to sync the time and/or weather of the worlds on your server with any location(s) in the real world. It aims to be as lightweight as possible while supporting all Minecraft versions back to 1.7.

## ⚙️ Installation

Setting up RealTimeWeather is quick and easy. Simply put the latest version of the plugin into your server's plugin directory, run your server to generate the configuration file, and configure away. If you need help, check out the [Wiki](https://github.com/Jack1424/RealTimeWeather/wiki) for detailed instructions.

## ❗Support/Contributions

If you have any problems or suggestions, please open an [issue](https://github.com/Jack1424/RealTimeWeather/issues). If you want to contribute to the project, feel free to open a [pull request](https://github.com/Jack1424/RealTimeWeather/pulls). I'll try to take a look as soon as I can.
